mapper.sql: t1.id, t1.lock_version as version, t1.biz_no, t1.title, t1.summary, t1.draft_version, t1.published_version, t1.workflow_status, t1.current_snapshot_id, t1.last_review_comment, t1.created_at, t1.updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM content_draft t1 INNER JOIN ( -- 子查询仅使用覆盖索引查出对应页的主键 id SELECT id FROM content_draft
-- 安全的排序逻辑：使用 choose 标签做白名单过滤，彻底杜绝 SQL 注入 ORDER BY
created_at updated_at biz_no id
ASC DESC , id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset} ) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id

select workflow_status as status, count(*) as cnt from content_draft
group by workflow_status
mapper.update:
update content_draft set title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, body = #{body}, draft_version = #{draftVersion}, published_version = #{publishedVersion}, workflow_status = #{workflowStatus}, current_snapshot_id = #{currentSnapshotId}, last_review_comment = #{lastReviewComment}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, lock_version = lock_version + 1 where id = #{id} and lock_version = #{expectedVersion} and biz_no = #{bizNo} and workflow_status in
#{status}
